questions.question: 1 (a) The electronic structures of five atoms, A, B, C, D and E, are shown. ABCDE Answer the following questions about these atoms. Each atom may be used once, more than once or not at all. Which atom, A, B, C, D or E, (i) is in Group VIII of the Periodic Table, .............................. [1] (ii) is a chlorine atom, .............................. [1] (iii) has 17 pro
